TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Laidazuan(malavi), title = Laidazuan(malavi), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Laidazuan(malavi)} }

S.FORM: Laidazuan(malavi) Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Laidazuan(malavi) a niyaro', 227 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 782 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 757 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 94%, Seediq 1%, Amis 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɾaiɬ~ɮa*o~u~uan(maɾab~vi) itiniaj i xinji ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u ɾaiɬ~ɮa*o~u~uan(maɾab~vi) a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, səəɬ~ɮi* *%, amis *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Laidazuan(malavi) Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Laidazuan(malavi) a niyaro', 227 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 782 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 757 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 94%, Seediq 1%, Amis 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
